title: Hawser
description: Dockhand agent for managing remote Docker environments

env.name: TOKEN
env.label: Agent Token (required when port is published)

note: Deploys the Hawser agent (standard mode) so a central Dockhand instance can manage this Docker host remotely. Port 2376 must be reachable from the central server. A TOKEN is required when the port is exposed on a non-loopback address.
